clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Standardized protocol for accurate office-based blood pressure measurement
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Initial patient encounter, routine check-ups, hypertension screening visits
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Validated BP reading protocol + patient instructions + measurement averaging

navigationPath.purpose: Entry point - display pre-measurement instructions checklist
Guide patient through 30-minute prep (avoid caffeine/exercise/smoking, empty bladder)
Verify temperature-controlled room, validated device, correct cuff size
Ensure proper positioning (bare arm, supported at heart level, sitting with back support, feet flat, legs uncrossed)
5+ minutes quiet rest - no talking, no phone use
Calculate and display average of readings
Provide readings verbally and in writing to patient

validationRules: systolic1 and systolic2 within 10 mmHg for consistency
All pre-measurement conditions must be met

rules: Verify patient avoided caffeine, exercise, smoking for ≥30 min
Check correct cuff size on bare arm
Confirm arm supported at heart level
Verify patient seated correctly (feet on floor, legs uncrossed, back supported)
Enforce 5+ minutes quiet rest (no talking, no phone)
Flag protocol violations that could affect accuracy

categories.name: Protocol_Violation
categories.action: Display warning, recommend correction before measurement

protocolAdherence.description: True if all pre-measurement conditions met

readingsConsistent.description: True if readings differ by ≤10 mmHg

verbalAndWrittenProvided.description: True if results communicated to patient

appDisplay.screenType: Standard result screen (or crisis alert if thresholds met)

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Document average readings in patient chart, classify BP stage
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Repeat measurement at next visit or sooner if indicated
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Take 2+ readings ≥1 minute apart each visit
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag protocol violations for quality improvement
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log all readings, average, protocol adherence, and patient communication confirmation
